crime.value: Kidnapping/assault of Auggie by attackers working with Ben
crime.quote: A hand clamped onto his left arm... A powerful electric shock jolted him from behind.

victim.value: Auggie (August Anderson), blind CIA tech operative targeted due to romantic rivalry
victim.quote: Tech. Op. August Anderson... was about to become one of the central objects of his attention and hatred.

culprit_and_motive.value: Ben and accomplices; motive is jealousy over Annie's affections for Auggie
culprit_and_motive.quote: Annie was his. He'd found her, claimed her, even killed for her.

suspect_architecture.value: Intelligence agency infiltration plot with Jacob Steinmann as Mossad double agent in CIA, Ben as terrorist operative pursuing Annie
suspect_architecture.quote: it was decided to place double agents inside the Central Intelligence Agency. Jacob Steinmann was one of the 6 selected

red_herring.value: Ben's romantic pursuit of Annie masks his terrorist connections and surveillance of CIA operative Auggie
red_herring.quote: hadn't he caught hell from his terrorist bosses for that one

social_world.value: CIA operational hierarchy with intelligence agencies, kibbutz communal structure, terrorist networks intersecting
social_world.quote: His parents were both Americans from devout Jewish families who had immigrated to the Biblical homeland

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical confrontation reveals Ben's coordination with attackers and terrorist connections through dialogue
reveal_mechanic.quote: a voice he knew said, 'Dammit, you fools! I told you he was dangerous.'

media_and_audience.value: 9/11 attacks as backdrop justifying Mossad infiltration operations, with US intelligence failures as premise
media_and_audience.quote: When the United States seemingly ignored warnings from Mossad that terrorists were planning large scale attacks

investigator_wound.value: Auggie's blindness and disability status exploited by adversaries who underestimate his capabilities
investigator_wound.quote: Surely, you're not falling for that pitiful half-man?

_meta.title: ebook just us friendz blind ambition
